result.title: Computer use in Codex
result.description:
Computer use lets Codex work across local apps without taking over your Mac.

Ari Weinstein talks about what changes when agents can click, type, and keep working in the background.

Timestamps

00:34 Why computer use
02:06 Codex works across local apps
03:41 Multiple apps at once
05:14 Screenshots plus accessibility data
08:35 App-by-app permissions

result.title: What Codex Unlocks for Endava
result.description:
“Codex has helped small teams of people deliver massive value in a very, very condensed timeframe.” 

Joe Dunleavy and Mike Krolnik share what life was like in the pre-Codex era: 

“There is work before Codex, and work after Codex. The time velocity is substantially different.” 

Learn more: https://openai.com/codex/

result.title: Codex can now use Chrome directly on macOS and Windows.
result.description:
Codex is now even better at working with apps and sites in Chrome, and can now work in parallel across tabs in the background, without taking over your browser.

To get started on macOS and Windows, install the Chrome plugin in the Codex app.

https://openai.com/codex
